cgu.question: Any questions?
cgu.contact_desc: For any request related to your data or these conditions, contact us at

s1.title: 1. Platform Objective
s1.content: Luminary Events is an event management platform allowing users to discover, create, and participate in events. Use of our services implies full acceptance of these terms.

s2.title: 2. Registration and Accounts
s2.content: Registration requires a name, a valid email address and a password. Your passwords are encrypted (bcrypt) and are never stored in plain text. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials.

s3.title: 3. Event Moderation
s3.content: Any event submitted by an organizer is subject to validation by our moderation team before publication. Hateful, illegal or misleading content will be rejected without notice.

s4.title: 4. Ticketing and Refunds
s4.content: Tickets purchased are personal and non-transferable. In case of cancellation by the organizer, a full refund will be made within 14 days. Voluntary refund requests are accepted until 48 hours before the event.

s5.title: 5. Data Protection (GDPR)
s5.content: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your personal data. You can permanently delete your account from your profile. We do not share your data with any third party.

s6.title: 6. Responsibilities
s6.content: Luminary Events acts as a technical intermediary. We are not responsible for the content of events published by organizers, nor for incidents occurring during these events.

s7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
s7.content: All visual, textual and technical elements of the platform are protected by copyright. Any unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
